case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $ 583.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER DENYING PETITIONERS ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF MANDATE
AMENDED PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA DAVIS, RAYMOND
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HOLMES, LATASHA

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $ 583.00 U.S. CURRENCY $583.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $583.00, JUDGMENT OF FOREFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION IS DECLARED FORFEITED. $123.00 TO BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT RAYMOND DAVIS. $460.00 DECLARED FORFEITED. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF FOREFITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY PARTIES. PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $ 583.00 U.S. CURRENCY $447.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $447.50, JUDGMENT OF FOREFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION IS DECLARED FORFEITED. $100.00 RELEASED TO CLAIMANT LATASHA HOLMES. $377.00 DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF FOREFITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY PARTIES. PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
